channel.title: Scrolls on the KING's Scribe, 7
channel.description: Recent content in Scrolls on the KING's Scribe, 7

item.title: Wayside
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Preparation of my heart; to encounter YHVH.

M13 Listen! A sower went out to sow.
And as he sowed, some seeds fell along the path, and the birds came and devoured them.

🌞

Assume a box for the cultivated plot.
Any sowing done in its padding (near the perimeter), will have some of the seed flung, falling on the wayside.

The wayside was “field” from the beginning.
However, after many footfalls cut through the fields, that portion of arable land, was reduced to a wayside. Fallow ground + Compaction. Doubly hard.

Whatever would sink in here has got to be hard, sharp, and driven. A pickaxe! ⛏️
The seed had no chance. So, it lies on the path - easy prey for hungry birds.

In my heart, it’s farmland.
If only there were just a wayside, or two.
But, man has an industrious enemy.
Having border control, the heart could’ve been kept from this eventuality: but, alas!

You see, I left the gates of my mind open to strange things; strange voices; strange culture. In film, books, media, & conversation.

These fill up the mind; percolating.
Next thing you don’t know, they’ve made their way down to the heart, called subconscious, trampling all o’er the place - making waysides!

Call for Wisdom!

What is the way?
“This, " says Wisdom, “first, Shut the Gates! "
There’s a channel currently open, from the senses to the mind; from the mind to the heart! Shut, first, the gates at the senses.

🔸See No Evil
🔸Hear No Evil
🔸Speak No Evil
🔸Sense Evil? Put up your shields!

“Then, " says Wisdom, “Unstop the Fountains! Re-dig the Wells! And moreover, call for Rain! "

For there is but one way to sweep out these strangers and make clean the land: a flood. Flood to eject. Flood to cleanse.
Not just any water, but that from above!
We need living water!!!

Come, sweet Holy Spirit.
Come as a flood!
Lift up a standard and sweep these away.
Out of existence. No place to hide.
Come, Holy Spirit and make me clean.

Tis a song from mine heart
Unto Thee, o God, to Thee.

So, the Spirit says to me.

My Child, you know what to do.
Prepare My advent; make plain My path.

“Yes Sir, I know! " I reply.
I must fill my mind with Your laws & secrets.
For by them alone, will You come.
Abba always sends forth His Word before His Spirit. This is the way!

So, I say!
Shut the Gates!
Bring the Thunder:
Call forth the Rain 🌧
and on the morrow,
ye fields, be ready again.

“Lastly, " says Wisdom, “Plough! Break up the Fallow Ground! "

Hos10 Sow for yourselves righteousness; Reap in mercy; Break up your fallow ground, For {now is} time to seek the LORD, Till He comes and rains righteousness on you.

item.title: What is Breath?
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Understanding the Way

Understanding Kingdom

👑

Do not be anxious
But, abide in Abba’s REST thus: 👇🏽
🔸in all your ways {acknowledge Him} &
🔸{Live by His Righteousness} all your days.
Seeking first the Kingdom of GOD
and His Righteousness.
All other things need not be sought:
for they will be added to you.
=> {fully supplied, there’ll be nothing left to seek}

M6:33
But seek first the kingdom of God and His righteousness, and all these things shall be added to you.

M6 | 30-34
30. Now if God so clothes the grass of the field, which today is, and tomorrow is thrown into the oven, [will He] not much more [clothe] you, O you of little faith?
31. “Therefore do not worry, saying, " how shall I travel, whether shalt data come? What shall I eat? ’ or ‘What shall I write?’ or ‘What shall I wear? '
32. For after all these things the Gentiles seek. For your heavenly Father knows that you need all these things.
33. But seek first the kingdom of God and His righteousness, and all these things shall be added to you.
34. Therefore do not worry about tomorrow, for tomorrow will worry about its own things. Sufficient for the day [is] its own trouble.

J627
It’s a waste of man’s life to
purpose, plan, and work unto
the provision of needs/ pleasure.
The earth is temporal:
so is the bread thereof!

Rather,
purpose, plan, and be diligent to
partake regularly, of
the Living Bread of Eternal Life,
which never spoils.
I, Son of Man, have it.
Abba God has authorised Me to feed men.”

Lk12
22. Then He said to His disciples, “Therefore I say to you, do not worry about your life, what you will eat; nor about the body, what you will put on.
23. Life is more than food, and the body [is more] than clothing.
26. If you then are not able to do [the] least, why are you anxious for the rest?
29. “And do not seek what you should eat or what you should drink, nor have an anxious mind.
31. But seek the kingdom of God, and all these things shall be added to you.
32. “Do not fear, little flock, for it is your Father’s good pleasure to give you the kingdom.

Kingdom Come

M610 Your kingdom come. Your will be done On earth as in heaven.

Kingdom Come = His Will Done

  • Kingdom come in Heaven? 👇🏽 R12
  • Kingdom come in 7 (spirit + nephesh)?
  • Kingdom come in Adeniyi Bloodline?
  • Kingdom come in CFA?
  • Kingdom come in F?
  • Kingdom come in A?

M1228 But if I cast out demons by the Spirit of God, surely the kingdom of God has come upon you. 👇🏽

But if I walk by the Holy Spirit, I bring the Kingdom of God unto men.

Lk17 | The Coming of the Kingdom
Now when He was asked by the Pharisees when the kingdom of God would come, He answered them and said, “The kingdom of God does not come with observation; nor will they say, ‘See here! ’ or ‘See there! ’ For indeed, the kingdom of God is within you. "

R12 | So the great dragon was cast out, that serpent of old, called the Devil and Satan, who deceives the whole world; he was cast to the earth, and his angels were cast out with him.

  • Then I heard a loud voice saying in heaven, “Now,
    🔸Salvation and
    🔸Strength, and
    🔸the kingdom of our God, and
    🔸the power of His Christ
    have come,
    for the accuser of our brethren, who accused them before our God day and night, has been cast down.
  • And they overcame him by the blood of the Lamb and by the word of their testimony, and they did not love their lives to the death.
  • Therefore rejoice, O heavens, and you who dwell in them! Woe to the inhabitants of the earth and the sea! For the devil has come down to you, having great wrath, because he knows that he has a short time. "
When Ye says, “First”

M5:24 leave your gift there before the altar, and go your way. First be reconciled to your brother, and then come and offer your gift.

M7:5 Hypocrite! First remove the plank from your own eye, and then you will see clearly to remove the speck from your brother’s eye.

M12:29 Or how can one enter a strong man’s house and plunder his goods, unless he first binds the strong man? And then he will plunder his house.

M13:30 Let both grow together until the harvest, and at the time of harvest I will say to the reapers, “First gather together the tares and bind them in bundles to burn them, but gather the wheat into my barn. “’”

M17:11 Jesus answered and said to them, “Indeed, Elijah is coming first and will restore all things.

M17:27 Nevertheless, lest we offend them, go to the sea, cast in a hook, and take the fish that comes up first. And when you have opened its mouth, you will find a piece of money; take that and give it to them for Me and you. "

M23:26 Blind Pharisee, first cleanse the inside of the cup and dish, that the outside of them may be clean also.

The GODKing installs His Son,
“Yeshua + Se7en” CHRIST
as King over the whole earth.
In Dominion.
🔸Ruling by Decrees
🔸from On High - above all gods
🔸for Justice & Truth
🔸for Conquest (by armies)
🔸for Rejoicing & Worship
🔸for delight of the people
🔸giving lavishly
🔸for Blessing, Favour, & Life
🔸for Praise & GLORY
🔸for Judging the Wicked and
🔸Rewarding the Righteous
🔸for uniting the nations under one king
🔸for eras & dynasties in the timeline

Psalms 2:7 The king says, “I will announce the Lord’s decree. He said to me: ‘You are my son! This very day I have become your father!

Psalms 44:4 You are my king, O God! Decree Jacob’s deliverance!

Psalms 45:1 For the music director; according to the tune of “Lilies;” by the Korahites, a well-written poem, a love song. My heart is stirred by a beautiful song. I say, “I have composed this special song for the king; my tongue is as skilled as the stylus of an experienced scribe.”

item.title: The King's Plea
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
The KING's heart yearns for thee; come home --- tis the plea.

My son, come back home to Me.
Your departure has been killing Me, because I love you so!
I believe in you.
I have plans for you — superior to anything you can ever dream up.

My Scribe, se7en, will tell you what’s on My Heart.
Please, let Me save you.
It’s your choice: make it count.

item.title: Building the City
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Collection of ancient pathways, leading truth-seekers onto transformation, within the Divine.

There’s a kind of statement in the canon, that we have to understand. So profound, indeed, that its ramifications are beyond words. Behold, 👇🏾

Let this mind be in you, which was also in Christ Jesus, …
… But we have the mind of Christ
that you put off, concerning your former conduct, the old man which grows corrupt according to the deceitful lusts, and be renewed in the spirit of your mind.

You see, man is triune.
Spirit; Soul; Body. {note: the mind is in the soul}

The action and expression of man’s being, is much like the operation of a machine.
Consider Iron Man, the comic hero. It’s a human inside the mechanized suit, the suit has been engineered and programmed by this human, Mr. Tony Stark, to do those things that Mr. Stark wants done; how he wants them done. So, when the suit is in use, the world sees not the man within, but may bear witness to what they consider acts of heroism.

This is pretty much identical, to the triune nature of man.

The human within the suit, represents your Spirit.
The programming and Artificial Intelligence, Jarvis, through whom the suit is controlled, represents your Soul.
And the suit, itself, represents your body.
Triune. Three, yet, one.

You soliloquize; talk and converse within yourself, much like Mr. Stark holds conversation with Jarvis within the suit. Sometimes, you want things done, but your soul informs you that you’re losing power, and cannot fire thrusters anymore (maybe you’d skipped a few meals).

Now, this is where things get interesting.
If someone else were to legally and truthfully, inherit the Iron Man suit after Mr. Stark’s passing, there’d be a world of difference.

  • First of all, the character of the man in the suit. Is he righteous or evil? A good guy, or villain?!
  • Second, the purpose of the man in the suit. Is the suit’s current programming suited to his purpose, plans and projects?
  • Thirdly, customizations. What if, Mr. Stark had programmed Jarvis to play raunchy music whilst in flight, and the new guy prefers Zen music? You can’t get into flow state and do deep work if the vibe is all messed up, can you?
    There’s more, of course; but these’re core!

So, what’s the difference between the unsaved, since he “popped-outta-momma,” gent, and the one who has believed in Jesus Christ for salvation from sin? Between the natural (before Cross of Christ) and the carnal/spiritual man (since redemption at Cross of Christ)? When someone walks past you into Target, meets with Jesus, maybe through a teen-preacher, and walks back out, saved, how are they any different?

The iron man suit stays the same - same face, scrawny beard and build.
Jarvis stays installed - same old soul; he still loves tacos.
⚠️ The man inside the suit, has changed.
It was a guy called “Mr. Flesh, " or “Old Man. "
And now, its “Christ” or “New Man. "

So, when Brother Paul wrote, that you put off, concerning your former conduct, the old man, he meant, “merely uninstalling the apps running on the OS (Jarvis) won’t do. You’ve got to format the whole drive. " Jarvis gotta go!
Christ, the New Man, needs his own mind {“mind of Christ”} to live {“express Himself”} through.

If you’re never taught, you’ll keep wondering why you stumble at old thought patterns.
One moment you’re minding your business, mowing the lawn (or scrolling through your feed): suddenly a voluptuous female goes waltzing by, clad in leather tights, and next thing you know, you’re bolting the bathroom door, dropping your pants, and masturbating.

Jesus wouldn’t do that: and you know you’re made new of Spirit, just like Him, so what gives?! The mind that is in you, was trained to lust by the Old man. Jarvis OS, gotta go! We need a new Operating System. And not a new, different distro of same old Linux; no! A whole other OS, entirely.

Now, that you realise the conundrum — that you’ll never be free to the honourable, righteous things that you know to preach: until this mind be in you, which was also in Christ Jesus, how?

If you’ve ever formatted a PC or phone; no, not a factory reset: a formatting, you know you’ve got to get enough power in the battery to see you through the entire process; get a disc or thumb drive or some external storage that holds the new OS; access to the BIOS or root system of your device; and careful patience.

So, how does that apply?

Device OS Soul
1. 🔋Power Invite the Holy Spirit to power this transformation
2. 💾 New OS Software Any programme is essentially a comprehensive list of definitions and commands. So, evidently, it’s the Teachings in the Holy Bible. In particular, teachings (law) on the mountains of God. {see Isaiah 2v3; Micah 4v2} The actual teachings are in two volumes - old and new. Mosaic Law (Exodus 24:12) and Eternal Law (Matthew chapters 5-7), respectively. Go for the full thing, I say.
3. 🗝️ BIOS/ Root Access You can’t format an OS while it is in use. So, shut your door: that means, shut your senses against all distractions — food, too, if you can; and trust that as you begin to read and meditate the Bible’s mountain teachings, they will translate you to the very mountain-top from whence they came, and open up the root directory or BIOS of your soul.
4. ⚒️ Careful Patience - v1 Have you ever wondered, why if you quit on something when it gets tough, it appears to have grown bigger, and will never cease to mock you, until you square your shoulders and give it all it takes? Don’t learn the hard way. Commit to a doable minimum of regular Bible reading & praying, to be practised daily, without fail. You’re not limited to the bare minimum that you promised (& wrote in your journal). It’s better to promise a daily one chapter or thirty minutes; and keep it consistently, than promise 4hours, and never start.
5. 🏗️ Careful Patience - v2 Yeah! This is where you’ve fed a great deal on the full teachings of God’s Law; and are now ready for understanding in specific mysteries. It’s time for depth unto mastery. That’s what the “Truth to Behold” series are for. Mediation and contemplative praying. Never rush. Meditating one of these can be enjoyed for decades. One verse. Same verse. Everyday. For days, weeks, months, years; mysteries deeper still, uncovered every time. Oh, take me to that place; beholding Thine Glory o God.

After all is said, please consider these precepts:

The Foundation:

  • Believe in Jesus Christ as your Salvation
  • Learn how to be led by the Holy Spirit
  • Read through the canon, Holy Bible, multiple times
  • Converse with the Father as His child

The Principal Virtues:

  • Love
  • Faith
  • Wisdom

The Pillars of Growth:

  • Food & Drink (“Bread & Water/ Milk/ Wine, " which is the word of God)
  • Exercise (Prayer, Obedience, Walking by Faith)
  • Rest (confidence in GOD)

The Definition of Kingdom-Life

“Trust and Obey”

I trust that the Lord will help me, frequently, to come back; writing more fully, articles of the KING’s blueprint for shaping your life into an edifice; a tower of love and glorious light. Indeed, the blueprint is to be a series; masterfully authored in the power and might of the Holy Spirit.

Peace be with you, brethren.

item.title: Outflow of Life
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
Walking it Out

Monday • 10.06.24

Seek first the KING’s Business and His ‘Standard to Live by.’

The provision promised in section M633 is not strange. Rather, it is commonplace, like these which are provided on earth, with examples all around you. 👇🏾

  • Staff School {best quality education for your children}
  • Staff Quarters {fully-furnished}
  • Office Supplies {do the KING’s business with HIS resources}
  • Health Centre & Insurance {your family is wholly covered}
  • Company Vehicle & Driver {maintenance & fueling of vehicle is covered}
  • Chef, Servants & Security {angelic helpers, co-labourers; watchers & warriors}
  • Travel allowance {national, international}
  • Paid Leave & sponsored Vacations {fully paid everything with extra stipend}
  • Office Canteen/Dining
  • Salary
  • Bonuses
  • Gratuity
  • Sponsorship for further Education
  • Sponsored Trainings & Conferences
  • Scholarship for your dependents
  • EVERYTHING {including what you haven’t even thought you’d need}

All these and more are wholly covered/sponsored by Governments & Multinationals for their staff; and even so much more for their Ambassadors & Expatriates respectively.

How much more will GOD supply to HIS Servants?!

Brethren & Ministers in CHRIST, have we not been failing to submit our slips to the appropriate angelic offices?
Failing to remain in our allotted address on Faith Street? Failing to go to the post office and check our P.O.Box? Failing to take those ‘silly’ steps in which the delivery is hid?

item.title: Tied to a Chair
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
When limits are set, what will you do?

Ever wondered how men keep elephants penned behind a wall of slim trunks, set in the earth?
Ever wondered why horsepower means so much to speedsters, but a horse will remained tied to a plastic chair? I’ve seen one. I’ll have the picture for you in a jiffy (I hope).

When the elephants were yet calves:
the horses, yet foals,
the trees, yet saplings,
they were penned, tied, constrained.

They pushed, and they rammed, and they strained,
till they submitted to their experience.

Thus, now, in the mind of matriarch mama-dumbo;
and regal steed, sits enthroned, a lie:
Set in stone.

We tried. We failed. It can’t be moved.

Today, as the horse tied to a plastic chair,
do the unclean lead a thoroughbred champion of Zion
–dance, do dance, to the beat of lustful thoughts
played from without.

“Remember, " they say, “you never could hold out against the onslaught of temptation weighing upon your soul. Why don’t you give in? You’ll have ample opportunity to grow strong (enough to overcome) later.

“And besides, God will forgive you. "

But you’re STRONG NOW!
Not only can you refuse temptation 1C10.13,
but you can scourge the tempters.
So, scourge them: have them return to base, with wails and scars.
“NO MORE!”

#listen
You need not think of living a holy life.
Rather, commit to live holy in this moment.

Peace.

item.title: Rise
item.author: thekingsscribe7@gmail.com (se7en Adeniyi)
item.description:
thoughts of ascension ...

Smoke rises. So do flames.
And so do tempestuous waves driven by the wind.

Ah! Wind.
Think of kites, balloons, planes - paper or metal, craft.
Everything that rises, loves wind?

Then, I need to make friends with the wind.
But what about me?
Have I wings so I may fly;
soar on the gales?

Can eagles’ wings sprout from my back,
or must I stow a paraglider’s gear?
Must I, perhaps, become as a balloon
pumped up with hot air…

I like wings.
Wings that shimmer, iridescent.
Catching the morning’s glow.
Wings that would phase from light to crystal
crystal to mana; mana to chaos;
chaos to song; harmony to El.

I want nine sets of wings.

So…
How do I get them?
I know nine might be a stretch,
but I’ve heard test, of three.

For of the seraphs, hath they written,
that they had six wings –
with two they covered their faces,
with two they covered their feet,
and with two they did fly.

As man, how do I begin?
Whence shall my first pair come?
Test, I pray, another man’s notes.
For the prophet, Selvaraj, didst write:
Being still, didst I wait,
till eagle’s wings brake from my back.

Fix my heart on Thee.
Set my affections, and gaze, on Thee.
Quiet shall I be; till mine wings come from Thee -
I shall be as You are, Eloi.

Why hast thou come; and
what dost thou seek of Me?
But gifts bestowed; or Mine heart true?
Thine gifts bestowed, and Thine heart, Eloi.
For to this end shall I have Your gifts:
that by them, I see You.

Amen.
